articles.title: Bahrain and Saudi Arabian GPs will not take place in April
articles.summary: Bahrain and Saudi Arabian GPs will not take place in April. After careful evaluations, the Bahrain and Saudi Arabian Grands Prix will not take place in April.

articles.title: How Qualifying in China changed the betting markets
articles.summary: How Qualifying in China changed the betting markets. After an eventful Qualifying session in Shanghai, our betting writers look at how the odds have changed.

articles.title: Bet Builder tips for Chinese Grand Prix selected
articles.summary: Bet Builder tips for Chinese Grand Prix selected. We’ve assessed the betting markets and made our Bet Builder selections for the Chinese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Chinese Grand Prix short-form betting tips
articles.summary: Chinese Grand Prix short-form betting tips. Our expert betting writers give their short-form betting tips for all the major Chinese Grand Prix markets.

articles.title: Wolff praises 'mature' Antonelli after history-making pole
articles.summary: Wolff praises 'mature' Antonelli after history-making pole. Kimi Antonelli took his first Grand Prix pole position in China on Saturday, breaking a record that had stood since 2008.

articles.title: What the teams said – Sprint day and Qualifying in China
articles.summary: What the teams said – Sprint day and Qualifying in China. The drivers and teams report back on the Sprint and Qualifying from the Shanghai International Circuit for the 2026 Chinese Grand Prix.

articles.title: What are the strategy options for the Chinese Grand Prix?
articles.summary: What are the strategy options for the Chinese Grand Prix?. Matt Youson takes a look at the different pit stop and tyre options that are available to the teams on race day at the Shanghai International Circuit.

articles.title: What To Watch For in the Chinese Grand Prix
articles.summary: What To Watch For in the Chinese Grand Prix. Chris Medland picks out five key things to keep an eye on when the lights go out on race day at the Shanghai International Circuit.

articles.title: Red Bull Qualifying changes made 'zero difference'  – Verstappen
articles.summary: Red Bull Qualifying changes made 'zero difference'  – Verstappen. Max Verstappen believes that changes implemented by Red Bull for Qualifying made 'zero difference', with the four-time World Champion set to start the Chinese Grand Prix from eighth on the grid.

articles.title: McLaren ‘about where we belong’ in China Qualifying – Piastri
articles.summary: McLaren ‘about where we belong’ in China Qualifying – Piastri. Oscar Piastri believes that McLaren are “about where we belong” after taking P5 and P6 in Qualifying for the Chinese Grand Prix, with Lando Norris suggesting that the team are “a step behind” their rivals.

articles.title: Formula 1 officially postpones Bahrain and Saudi races
articles.summary: Formula 1 officially postpones Bahrain and Saudi races. The fourth and fifth rounds of the 2026 championship were due to take place on April 12 and 19 respectively as part of a double-header.

articles.title: Antonelli checks off an inevitable record as youngest F1 polesitter
articles.summary: Antonelli checks off an inevitable record as youngest F1 polesitter. A first career pole for Kimi Antonelli before he turns 20 comes as no surprise, now a first win awaits.

articles.title: Russell feared P10 start after issues hampered Chinese Grand Prix qualifying
articles.summary: Russell feared P10 start after issues hampered Chinese Grand Prix qualifying. George Russell will start the Chinese Grand Prix from the front row, but he thought he might have to be further back after car problems in Q3.

articles.title: ‘The car is completely undriveable’ - Verstappen struggles to make a mark in China
articles.summary: ‘The car is completely undriveable’ - Verstappen struggles to make a mark in China. Red Bull appears to have fallen further down the order in Shanghai.

articles.title: Antonelli becomes F1’s youngest polesitter in Chinese GP qualifying
articles.summary: Antonelli becomes F1’s youngest polesitter in Chinese GP qualifying. Kimi Antonelli broke Sebastian Vettel's 18-year record for youngest polesitter as his Mercedes teammate George Russell battled car issues.

articles.title: Russell survives early scrap with Hamilton to win Shanghai Sprint
articles.summary: Russell survives early scrap with Hamilton to win Shanghai Sprint. Mercedes maintained its dominance at the front of the pack as Russell held off the Ferraris of Hamilton and Leclerc to score a Sprint victory.

articles.title: Russell reveals timing line quirk led to start issues, with a proposed fix being opposed by Ferrari
articles.summary: Russell reveals timing line quirk led to start issues, with a proposed fix being opposed by Ferrari. George Russell says a change that would impact starts for teams at the Chinese Grand Prix is being opposed by a rival team after a number of cars did not have full batteries on the grid in Melbourne.

articles.title: Hamilton calls for Ferrari push to close PU deficit to Mercedes
articles.summary: Hamilton calls for Ferrari push to close PU deficit to Mercedes. Lewis Hamilton says Ferrari has the car to compete with Mercedes but needs to find more performance from its power unit to get on level terms.

articles.title: Verstappen laments ‘disaster’ day for Red Bull in Sprint qualifying
articles.summary: Verstappen laments ‘disaster’ day for Red Bull in Sprint qualifying. Max Verstappen says Red Bull’s Friday at the Chinese Grand Prix was “a disaster pace-wise” as both drivers struggled for grip and barely made the top 10 in qualifying for the Sprint.

articles.title: Technical updates: 2026 Chinese Grand Prix
articles.summary: Technical updates: 2026 Chinese Grand Prix. Ferrari is the only one of the top four teams to bring a new component to the Chinese Grand Prix, while Formula 1 newcomer Cadillac has also introduced upgrades.

articles.title: F1 cancels Bahrain & Saudi Arabia Grands Prix
articles.summary: F1 cancels Bahrain & Saudi Arabia Grands Prix. The Bahrain and Saudi Arabian Grand Prix weekends are cancelled because of the ongoing conflict in the Middle East.

articles.title: Mercedes dominate but show first signs of vulnerability
articles.summary: Mercedes dominate but show first signs of vulnerability. Mercedes show a first hint of 2026 vulnerability in qualifying for the Chinese Grand Prix, but still end up with a front-row lock-out to underline their superiority over the field at the start of this season.

articles.title: Antonelli youngest polesitter after Russell issues in China
articles.summary: Antonelli youngest polesitter after Russell issues in China. Mercedes' Kimi Antonelli becomes the youngest driver to set pole position in Formula 1 history by leading team-mate George Russell at the Chinese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Russell wins eventful Chinese GP sprint race
articles.summary: Russell wins eventful Chinese GP sprint race. Mercedes' George Russell wins the sprint race at the Chinese Grand Prix after a frantic scrap in the early laps with Lewis Hamilton's Ferrari.

articles.title: F1: Chequered Flag
articles.summary: F1: Chequered Flag. An eventful sprint & a dramatic qualifying. The team reflect on Chinese GP Saturday.

articles.title: They were told it wasn't for girls, but these could be the future faces of F1
articles.summary: They were told it wasn't for girls, but these could be the future faces of F1. F1 Academy wants to nurture and develop female drivers who can compete at the top level of motorsport.

articles.title: More than the Score
articles.summary: More than the Score. Max Verstappen's set to compete in his first endurance race - is he getting bored of F1?

articles.title: Russell accuses Ferrari of selfishness over rules
articles.summary: Russell accuses Ferrari of selfishness over rules. Mercedes driver George Russell accuses Ferrari of being "selfish" for blocking a change to the rules to improve safety at race starts.

articles.title: How to follow Chinese Grand Prix on the BBC
articles.summary: How to follow Chinese Grand Prix on the BBC. All the key BBC coverage details for round two of the Formula 1 season at the Chinese Grand Prix in Shanghai, which takes place from 13-15 March.

articles.title: Andrew Benson Q&A: Send us your questions
articles.summary: Andrew Benson Q&A: Send us your questions. Our F1 correspondent Andrew Benson is doing a weekly Q&A this season, so get your questions in now.
